Class RestaurantSettings

java.lang.Object
Entities.RestaurantSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RestaurantSettings extends Object implements Serializable
Represents the configuration and settings of the restaurant, including maximum tables, weekly opening hours, special dates, and reservation duration. This class is implemented as a singleton to ensure only one instance exists in the system.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Description
    private static RestaurantSettings
    instance
    The single instance of RestaurantSettings.
    private int
    maxTables
    Maximum number of tables in the restaurant.
    private int
    reservationDurationHours
    Duration of a reservation in hours (default is 2 hours).
    private List<SpecialDates>
    specialDates
    List of special dates with custom opening and closing hours.
    private List<WeeklyOpeningHours>
    weeklyOpeningHours
    List of regular weekly opening hours.

      private int maxTables
      Maximum number of tables in the restaurant.

    • weeklyOpeningHours

      private List<WeeklyOpeningHours> weeklyOpeningHours
      List of regular weekly opening hours.

    • specialDates

      private List<SpecialDates> specialDates
      List of special dates with custom opening and closing hours.

      private int reservationDurationHours

  • Constructor Details

    • RestaurantSettings

      public RestaurantSettings()
      Private constructor to prevent direct instantiation. Initializes the weekly opening hours and special dates lists.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static RestaurantSettings getInstance()
      Returns the single instance of RestaurantSettings. Creates a new instance if it has not been initialized yet.
      Returns:
      the singleton instance of RestaurantSettings

    • getMaxTables

      public int getMaxTables()
      Returns the maximum number of tables.
      Returns:
      the maximum number of tables

    • setMaxTables

      public void setMaxTables(int newMaxTables)
      Sets the maximum number of tables.
      Parameters:
      newMaxTables - the maximum tables to set

    • getWeeklyOpeningHours

      public List<WeeklyOpeningHours> getWeeklyOpeningHours()
      Returns the list of weekly opening hours.
      Returns:
      list of WeeklyOpeningHours

    • setWeeklyOpeningHours

      public void setWeeklyOpeningHours(List<WeeklyOpeningHours> weeklyOpeningHours)
      Sets the list of weekly opening hours.
      Parameters:
      weeklyOpeningHours - the list of WeeklyOpeningHours to set

    • getSpecialDates

      public List<SpecialDates> getSpecialDates()
      Returns the list of special dates.
      Returns:
      list of SpecialDates

    • setSpecialDates

      public void setSpecialDates(List<SpecialDates> specialDates)
      Sets the list of special dates.
      Parameters:
      specialDates - the list of SpecialDates to set

    • getReservationDurationHours

      public int getReservationDurationHours()
      Returns the reservation duration in hours.
      Returns:
      reservation duration in hours

    • setReservationDurationHours

      public void setReservationDurationHours(int hours)
      Sets the reservation duration in hours.
      Parameters:
      hours - the number of hours for each reservation

    • getOpeningHoursForDay

      public WeeklyOpeningHours getOpeningHoursForDay(Day day)
      Returns the weekly opening hours for a given day.
      Parameters:
      day - the day of the week
      Returns:
      the WeeklyOpeningHours for that day, or null if not found

    • getOpeningHoursForDate

      public WeeklyOpeningHours getOpeningHoursForDate(LocalDate date)
      Returns the opening hours for a specific date. Special dates override weekly hours if present.
      Parameters:
      date - the date to check
      Returns:
      the WeeklyOpeningHours for the date, or null if the restaurant is closed

    • addWeeklyOpeningHour

      public void addWeeklyOpeningHour(WeeklyOpeningHours hours)
      Adds a weekly opening hours entry to the list.
      Parameters:
      hours - the WeeklyOpeningHours to add

    • addSpecialDate

      public void addSpecialDate(SpecialDates specialDate)
      Adds a special date entry to the list.
      Parameters:
      specialDate - the SpecialDates entry to add
